title: T-010 — OEE outbox publisher (5 events) + Zod payload contracts (OEE §12.2, R1)
prompt:
# T-010 — OEE outbox publisher

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §12.2 (event producer, 5 events), §12.3 (target_system='internal'), R1 outbox pattern
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `oee_outbox_events` table per §12.2 DDL and ship the publisher dispatcher routing 5 events to internal consumers (12-REPORTING cache invalidate, 13-MAINTENANCE D-MNT-3 MTBF/MTTR feed). Define Zod payload contracts in `packages/events/src/oee.ts`. Wire to Wave1 T-111 shared outbox dispatcher.

## Pre-flight
Read: `packages/db/migrations/` for latest migration number; existing Foundation T-003 events package shape and 13-MAINTENANCE T-012 outbox publisher pattern; Wave1 T-111 outbox dispatcher signature.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_c_outbox_events.sql` per §12.2 DDL: `oee_outbox_events(id BIGSERIAL PK, event_id UUID UNIQUE, org_id UUID NOT NULL, event_type TEXT, aggregate_id TEXT, payload JSONB, target_system TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'internal', status outbox_status_enum DEFAULT 'pending', attempt_count INT DEFAULT 0, next_retry_at TIMESTAMPTZ, delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, enqueued_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())`. RLS via app.current_org_id(). `idx_oee_outbox_dispatch ON oee_outbox_events(status, next_retry_at) WHERE status IN ('pending','failed')`.
2. `packages/events/src/oee.ts` exports Zod schemas + TS types (event_version='v1', idempotency_key UUID v7 per Foundation R14):
   - `oee.shift.aggregated` — payload {org_id, site_id, line_id, shift_id, shift_date, oee_pct, availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct, total_output_qty, total_downtime_min, occurred_at} (per §12.2 example).
   - `oee.daily.refreshed` — {org_id, site_id, refreshed_at, row_count}.
   - `oee.anomaly.detected` (P2) — {org_id, site_id, line_id, shift_id, anomaly_id, severity, oee_pct_actual, oee_pct_expected, deviation_sigma, detected_at}.
   - `oee.anomaly.resolved` (P2) — {org_id, anomaly_id, resolved_at, resolution_kind: 'auto'|'manual'}.
   - `oee.maintenance.triggered` (P2) — {org_id, site_id, line_id, trigger_date, avg_availability_pct, threshold_pct, consecutive_days, created_wo_id?}.
3. Dispatcher `apps/worker/src/oee/outbox-dispatcher.ts`: polls oee_outbox_events; validates payload against Zod schema; routes:
   - `oee.shift.aggregated` + `oee.daily.refreshed` → 12-REPORTING cache invalidate queue + 13-MAINTENANCE MTBF/MTTR feed queue (D-MNT-3).
   - `oee.anomaly.*` + `oee.maintenance.triggered` → 12-REPORTING + (P2) 13-MAINTENANCE auto-MWO consumer.
   - All target_system='internal' (no D365 push per §12.3).
   On success: status='delivered', delivered_at=now(). On Zod failure: status='failed', DLQ entry, no infinite retry. Idempotent on event_id.
4. Wire to Wave1 T-111 shared dispatcher polling loop (per-tenant via T-112).
5. Vitest: (a) all 5 Zod schemas parse sample payloads + reject missing required fields, (b) dispatcher routes shift.aggregated to 2 consumer queues, (c) invalid payload → DLQ + no infinite retry, (d) idempotent re-run on delivered row is no-op, (e) target_system='internal' for all events.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_c_outbox_events.sql [create]
- packages/events/src/oee.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/index.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/src/oee/outbox-dispatcher.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/oee/__tests__/outbox-dispatcher.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/__tests__/oee.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `\d oee_outbox_events` is read, then the §12.2 DDL columns + RLS via app.current_org_id() + idx_oee_outbox_dispatch index are present.
2. Given `oeeShiftAggregatedSchema.parse(payload)` with a valid payload, when called, then it returns the typed payload; missing oee_pct throws ZodError with path `oee_pct`.
3. Given an outbox row event_type='oee.shift.aggregated', when dispatcher runs, then 2 consumer queue messages are written (12-REPORTING cache invalidate + 13-MAINTENANCE MTBF/MTTR), and outbox row.status='delivered', delivered_at set.
4. Given an outbox row with invalid payload, when dispatcher runs, then status='failed', DLQ row created, no infinite retry.
5. Given dispatcher runs twice on the same delivered row, when checked, then second run is a no-op (idempotent on event_id).

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee/outbox-dispatcher + packages/events/oee asserting five ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/events vitest run` and `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run oee/outbox-dispatcher`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not push to D365 — OEE stays internal per §12.3.
- Do not retry indefinitely on validation failure — DLQ + status='failed'.
- Do not deviate from event_version='v1' — schema evolution policy (Foundation R14).
- Do not couple dispatcher to consumer module implementations — only route by event_type to consumer queues.
- Do not skip cross-module routing to 13-MAINTENANCE — D-MNT-3 MTBF/MTTR feed is a cross-module dependency.

pipeline_inputs.description: Zod payload contracts for 5 OEE outbox events + oee_outbox_events table + dispatcher routing to 12-REPORTING + 13-MAINTENANCE + DLQ on validation failure + idempotency.
pipeline_inputs.details: Cross-module routing: shift.aggregated + daily.refreshed → 12-REPORTING (cache invalidate) + 13-MAINTENANCE (D-MNT-3 MTBF/MTTR feed); anomaly.* + maintenance.triggered (P2) → 12-REPORTING + 13-MAINTENANCE auto-MWO. All target_system='internal' (§12.3 — no D365 push). Idempotency on event_id. Dispatcher reuses Wave1 T-111 shared loop polling pattern matching 13-MAINTENANCE T-012 publisher.
